'''yagoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mbret|mbret]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-g-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mbret|mbret]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yagoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yægereth|yægereth]] || [[word:yægerej|yægerej]] || [[word:yægeresh|yægeresh]] || [[word:yægere|yægere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yagogoroth|yagogoroth]] || [[word:yagogoroj|yagogoroj]] || [[word:yagogorosh|yagogorosh]] || [[word:yagogoro|yagogoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yagoroth|yagoroth]] || [[word:yagoroj|yagoroj]] || [[word:yagorosh|yagorosh]] || [[word:yagoro|yagoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yagofroth|yagofroth]] || [[word:yagofroj|yagofroj]] || [[word:yagofrosh|yagofrosh]] || [[word:yagofrof|yagofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yagorotho|yagorotho]] || [[word:yagorojo|yagorojo]] || [[word:yagorosho|yagorosho]] || [[word:yagoroko|yagoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yagoroth|yagoroth]] || [[word:yagoroj|yagoroj]] || [[word:yagorosh|yagorosh]] || [[word:yagoro|yagoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yagorothol|yagorothol]] || [[word:yagorojol|yagorojol]] || [[word:yagoroshol|yagoroshol]] || [[word:yagorokol|yagorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yagorothotho|yagorothotho]] || [[word:yagorojojo|yagorojojo]] || [[word:yagoroshosho|yagoroshosho]] || [[word:yagoroko|yagoroko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yagorothon|yagorothon]] || [[word:yagorojon|yagorojon]] || [[word:yagoroshon|yagoroshon]] || [[word:yagorokon|yagorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yagorothoro|yagorothoro]] || [[word:yagorojoro|yagorojoro]] || [[word:yagoroshoro|yagoroshoro]] || [[word:yagorokoro|yagorokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
